issues.title: arbitrary-send-eth
issues.description:
Escrow.transfer() (contract.sol#43-49) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- (recipient).transfer(amount) (contract.sol#45)
issues.recommendation: Add access control and input validation

issues.title: missing-zero-check
issues.description:
Escrow.constructor(address,address,uint256)._beneficiary (contract.sol#23) lacks a zero-check on :
		- beneficiary = _beneficiary (contract.sol#25)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: missing-zero-check
issues.description:
Escrow.constructor(address,address,uint256)._recipient (contract.sol#23) lacks a zero-check on :
		- recipient = _recipient (contract.sol#24)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#1)
issues.filename:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
issues.description:
Reentrancy in Escrow.transfer() (contract.sol#43-49):
	External calls:
	- (recipient).transfer(amount) (contract.sol#45)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- approvedTransaction = false (contract.sol#47)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- ApprovalEvent() (contract.sol#48)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: immutable-states
issues.description: Escrow.beneficiary (contract.sol#12) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.description: Escrow.recipient (contract.sol#9) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: unchecked-transfer
issues.description: unchecked-transfer detected
issues.recommendation: Check return values or use SafeERC20

issues.title: reason-string
issues.description: Error message for require is too long: 49 counted / 32 allowed
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.title: gas-small-strings
issues.description: GC: String exceeds 32 bytes
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.title: gas-custom-errors
issues.description: GC: Use Custom Errors instead of require statements
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide
